name: chart-line-label-custom
visual_summary: Chart Line Label Custom is a versatile chart component that displays custom line labels on a line chart. It's ideal for dashboards or visualizing data trends. Developers can use this component to present complex data in an intuitive and easy-to-understand format.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-line-label-custom
Description: Chart Line Label Custom is a versatile chart component that displays custom line labels on a line chart. It's ideal for dashboards or visualizing data trends. Developers can use this component to present complex data in an intuitive and easy-to-understand format.
Style: modern, material design, responsive
Interactions: hover effects, interactive, draggable
Tags: data visualization, graphing, charts, labels

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
